title: lilium leichtlinii var. majus
intro: Lilium leichtlinii var. majus, also known as the large-flowered Leichtlin's lily, is a bulbous perennial plant belonging to the lily family (Liliaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lilium leichtlinii var. majus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of certain skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by drying the flowers and using them in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
